title: "IN (0, ...)" on a JSON column returns non-matching values
poc: SELECT value FROM data WHERE value IN (0);
SELECT value FROM data WHERE value IN (0, 0);
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test2.data(value JSON, id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT);
SELECT value FROM test2.data WHERE value IN (0, '0');
SELECT value FROM test2.data WHERE value IN (0, 1, null);
